<?php /* * This file is part of the Symfony package. * * (c) Fabien Potencier <fabien@symfony.com> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Symfony\Component\HttpFoundation\File\Exception; class UnexpectedTypeException extends FileException { public function __construct(mixed $value, string $expectedType) { parent::__construct(\sprintf('Expected argument of type %s, %s given', $expectedType, get_debug_type($value))); } }
